scripts.setup-python: cd backend && if not exist ..\backend-venv (python -m venv ..\backend-venv) && ..\backend-venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt --quiet --upgrade
scripts.frontend: echo 'Frontend is now served by backend at http://localhost:8001'
scripts.serve: echo 'Frontend is now served by backend at http://localhost:8001'
